title: Anchor Fade
description: Makes popped Respawn Anchors fade out smoothly instead of disappearing instantly. The fade out and animation is customizable.
body:
AnchorFade is a client-side visual mod for crystal and anchor PvP that makes popped Respawn Anchors fade out smoothly instead of disappearing instantly. It is designed to make anchor fights look cleaner, easier to read, and more polished without changing any gameplay or server behavior.

## Features:
- Smooth fade effect for popped Respawn Anchors
- Fully customizable fade timing, opacity, and overlay color
- Optional animation effects such as movement, rotation, scale, shake, bobbing, and spin
- Built-in animation presets for quick setup
- Share and import codes for copying settings and animation setups
- Client-side only — does not affect damage, mechanics, or server-side logic
- Ressource Pack compatibility ✅
- Allowed on tier lists 🏆✅

## Preview of Anchor fading out with Default Settings
![Anchor becoming transparent GIF](https://media4.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExcm1lOGlyMjVic256cG9zcXpwaTcyam82NDQ5dzdwcnkzejVtdDV1ZiZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/NOWlAgeRRtHw30MgZ1/giphy.gif)

## General Settings with Cloth Config API
![General Settings with Cloth Config](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb7390359c91baf162f3e84ea52b4d48a37bbeb3.jpeg)

**AnchorFade is focused on visual clarity and style, giving popped anchors a cleaner look while keeping the actual PvP unchanged.**
